channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: America 250 Highlights the Next Generation with Launch of Patriot Games
Trump Blames 'Terrible Vandals' for Washington Pool Renovation Issues
item.description: President Donald Trump said on Saturday that 'terrible vandals' had sabotaged his renovation project of the Reflecting Pool in Washington, which will have to be redone.

item.title: Chinese AI Models Raise 'Sleeper Agent' Fears After Report Finds More Vulnerable Code for US Users
item.description: A Booz Allen report warns that Chinese AI models like DeepSeek and Qwen may generate more vulnerable code for U.S. government users, raising security concerns.

item.title: JD Vance Heads to Switzerland as Peace Talks Over MOU and Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Continue
